chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No. 1895 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 19.12.2016. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. On first date of hearing none was present for the petitioner, yet, the matter was taken up in the interest of justice and notices were issued to respondents. It appears that petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the present petition; therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ali Haider
